recommendations.title: Brownian Movement
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist's adulterous past continues to haunt her and her husband after they move to India.

recommendations.title: Outsourced
recommendations.overview: After his entire department is outsourced, an American novelty products salesman heads to India to train his replacement.

recommendations.title: Gia
recommendations.overview: Gia Carangi meteorically rises to modeling fame in the late 1970s but becomes overconsumed by persistent loneliness and drug addiction.

recommendations.title: Boys
recommendations.overview: Two teen track stars discover first love as they train for the biggest relay race of their young lives.

recommendations.title: Hichki
recommendations.overview: Hichki presents a positive and inspiring story about a woman who turns her biggest weakness into her biggest strength.

recommendations.title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
recommendations.overview: Raj is a rich, carefree, happy-go-lucky second generation NRI. Simran is the daughter of Chaudhary Baldev Singh, who in spite of being an NRI is very strict about adherence to Indian values. Simran has left for India to be married to her childhood fi

recommendations.title: Cocktail
recommendations.overview: A shy simple traditional girl leaves her family in India for her new husband in London, where she meets a shameless flirt and a complicated party girl.

recommendations.title: Another 9 1/2 Weeks
recommendations.overview: Despondent at losing his lover, a man wanders the streets of Paris and has an affair with her kinky friend.

recommendations.title: Killing Cabos
recommendations.overview: Two young men get involved with some criminals while trying to free the tycoon they kidnapped.

recommendations.title: Sierra Burgess Is a Loser
recommendations.overview: A case of mistaken identity results in unexpected romance when the most popular girl in high school and the biggest loser must come together to win over their crushes.
